Emily Johnson
Dallas, TX

Summary
Detail-oriented and physically fit Warehouse Associate with over 3 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to operate RF scanners efficiently and accurately. Committed to maintaining high safety standards and ensuring timely order fulfillment. Possesses strong basic computer skills and a willingness to learn new technologies. 

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operate RF scanners to track inventory and manage shipments, achieving a 98% accuracy rate.  
- Lift and move packages weighing up to 50 lbs consistently throughout the shift.  
- Collaborate with team members to ensure efficient workflow and timely order processing.  
- Assist in training new employees on warehouse procedures and equipment use.

Warehouse Worker  
XYZ Distribution, Fort Worth, TX  
January 2020 - May 2021  
- Managed incoming and outgoing shipments, performing quality checks on products.  
- Utilized computer systems to update inventory records and generate reports.  
- Maintained a clean and organized work environment, adhering to safety protocols.  
- Supported inventory management through physical counting and stock organization.

Certifications
- OSHA Forklift Safety Training  
- RF Scanner Operation Certification
